# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [DocumentationNode Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-documentationnode.html): The infrastructure supporting the distribution and versioning of the specification for external developers. Architectural overview of the DocumentationNode domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenApiSpec Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-openapispec.html): The core definition of the Supermodel API surface, defining endpoints, data models, and request/response structures. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpec domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
